---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python main.py`
2. Enter instruction: `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include full stack trace).

## Environment
- OS: [Windows/macOS/Linux]
- Python: [e.g. 3.10]
- UA²S Version: [e.g. v0.1.0]
